name: Tension
description: Unresolved contradiction — tracks conflicts between knowledge claims with involved references and resolution status.

global.schema:
enum TensionStatus {
    OPEN
    RESOLVED
    DISSOLVED
}

type TensionState {
    title: String
    description: String
    content: String
    involvedRefs: [String!]!
    status: TensionStatus
    observedAt: DateTime
    observedBy: String
    resolution: String
    resolvedAt: DateTime
}
global.initialValue:
{
    "title": null,
    "description": null,
    "content": null,
    "involvedRefs": [],
    "status": "OPEN",
    "observedAt": null,
    "observedBy": null,
    "resolution": null,
    "resolvedAt": null
}

operations.name: CREATE_TENSION
operations.schema:
input CreateTensionInput {
    title: String!
    description: String!
    content: String
    involvedRefs: [String!]!
    observedAt: DateTime!
    observedBy: String
}

operations.name: RESOLVE_TENSION

errors.name: TensionAlreadyResolvedError
errors.description: Tension is not in OPEN status

operations.name: DISSOLVE_TENSION

errors.name: TensionAlreadyResolvedError
errors.description: Tension is not in OPEN status

operations.name: ADD_INVOLVED_REF
operations.template: Add a note to the tension
operations.description: Add a note to the tension
